response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video and identified it as a promo for Nekomata Okayu's 2026 birthday concert. 
2. Segmented video: 00:00-02:59 (BGM/Intro/Countdown), 03:00-05:00 (Song performance).
3. Identified the song performed by Nekomata Okayu as 'Watch me!' by YOASOBI (Lyrics/Music by Ayase, as seen in the video at 03:14).
4. Used search to confirm 'Watch me!' by YOASOBI is the original, and retrieved official Japanese lyrics.
5. Drafted English translation and mapped to the requested JSON format.
response.global_summary: A promotional video for Nekomata Okayu's 2026 birthday live performance. It features a countdown, followed by a vocal performance by Nekomata Okayu of the song 'Watch me!' originally by YOASOBI.

scenes.description: Intro and countdown to the birthday live event. No vocal music is playing.
Nekomata Okayu performs the song 'Watch me!' on a digital stage.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I always cause trouble,
I always make you miserable,
But even so, you stay by my side.
I want to be by your side forever.
Vague words
Won't reach a serious person like you.
I want to peer into that sturdy heart of yours,
I want to melt it.
What about this kind of magic at a time like this?
What will come out?
Do it!
Ready!
try try try
Even if it's vague,
It's okay! It's okay!
witch one to pick
watch me do magic
Oh my, it's a development beyond my imagination,
I can't stop it anymore.
I'm sorry.
Spinning my wheels with overflowing thoughts,
Sprinkling a happy image,
And swinging it around with fancy magic.
I'll get nagged by you again,
But I like this kind of day by day.
Since that day
falling in love with you
Because it won't change,
Always only you.
So, look,
This is no time to be hesitant.
Grab a happy ending.
I want to be by your side
And laughing forever.
I was always left out,
Living a lonely life every day.
And then you appeared
In front of me.
You were carrying
The same loneliness.
A very, very
Kind person.
I still have many worries,
But neither I nor you are alone anymore.
I hope these noisy and beloved days
Will last forever.
Let fly a happy image,
With extraordinary fancy magic.
I'll likely get nagged by you again,
But I like this kind of day by day.
Since that day
falling in love with you
I want you to notice,
loving you
And precisely for that reason,
This is no time to be hesitant.
What kind of planning is next?
And again today, a happening.
What kind of
Strange thing will happen tomorrow?
Keep watching me by your side.
